# tic-tac-toe

> A Turborepo monorepo template wiring together React 19, Mantine 9, TanStack Query 5, Zod 3, Vite 8, Vitest 4, tsgo, vinext, Oxlint, Oxfmt, Pagefind, Cursor SDK, and Vercel.

## Overview

- Full-stack React monorepo with a Vite SPA (`apps/web`) and a vinext + Fumadocs docs site (`apps/docs`)
- Shared UI library in `packages/ui` with typed primitives built on Mantine, Zod forms, TanStack Query hooks, and DnD Kit sortables
- TypeScript type checking via tsgo (`@typescript/native-preview`) - no `tsc` binary
- Linting via Oxlint, formatting via Oxfmt - both configured at monorepo root
- Search powered by Pagefind (static, zero-JS-runtime)
- One-click Vercel deployment for both apps

- [Forms & Validation](/forms)
- [Sortable Lists](/sortable-lists)
- [Data Fetching](/data-fetching)
- [Autosave](/autosave)
- [API Reference](/api-reference)

## Source

- `packages/ui` - shared component/hook library (`@tic-tac-toe/ui`)
- `packages/tsconfig` - shared TypeScript configs (`@tic-tac-toe/tsconfig`)
- `apps/web` - Vite + React Router SPA (`@tic-tac-toe/web`)
- `apps/docs` - vinext + Fumadocs documentation site (`@tic-tac-toe/docs`)
- `scripts/` - Cursor SDK automation scripts (LLM doc generation)
